mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_request (sender_id, receiver_id, status, message, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{status}, #{message}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_request SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT fr.*, u.id as sender_id, u.username as sender_username, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar as sender_avatar, u.bio as sender_bio, u.role as sender_role, u.status as sender_status, u.created_at as sender_created_at, u.updated_at as sender_updated_at FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.sender_id = u.id WHERE fr.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC

SELECT fr.*, u.id as receiver_id, u.username as receiver_username, u.nickname as receiver_nickname, u.avatar as receiver_avatar, u.bio as receiver_bio, u.role as receiver_role, u.status as receiver_status, u.created_at as receiver_created_at, u.updated_at as receiver_updated_at FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.receiver_id = u.id WHERE fr.sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM friend_request WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
